title: Copper Rust
description: Adds the Copper Rust Item to Minecraft!
body:
- Do you ever get tired of waiting for copper to oxidize?
- Do you ever wish that you could just transfer the oxidation of one copper block to another?
- Well now you can! Using the Copper Rust Datapack, when stripping a copper block. You will receive a new item called Copper Rust Powder. Just hold it, and right click on the block you'd like to oxidize, and viola!


 
> Detailed Description.
- > When stripping a Copper Block, Copper Door, or Copper Trapdoor. You will receive 1 whole Copper Rust Powder.
- > When stripping all other types of copper you will receive 1-6 Copper Rust Nuggets.
- > 8 Copper Rust Nuggets can be combined in a crafting table to make 1 Copper Rust Powder.
- > This was done to prevent Copper Rust duplication via the crafting and subsequent stripping of copper slabs.
